title: abeec 180 Colouring Pencils | Bulk Coloured Pencil Set | Classroom & School Supplies | Art Pencils for Kids & Adults | Hexagonal Barrel | Pre-Sharpened Drawing & Sketching Pencils
features: Extensive Colour Selection – This set includes 180 colouring pencils in 18 vibrant shades, providing an extensive palette for creative projects, art classes, and professional drawings.
Hexagonal Barrel Design – Each pencil features an ergonomic hexagonal shape for a comfortable grip, making them ideal for kids, students, and adults while preventing rolling.
Pre-Sharpened & Ready to Use – All pencils come pre-sharpened, so they are ready for immediate use in colouring books, sketching, shading, and classroom activities.
Durable & High-Quality Materials – Designed with break-resistant leads and smooth application, ensuring a long-lasting and reliable colouring experience.
Perfect for Schools & Creative Hobbies – Ideal for classroom essentials, home activities, and professional artwork, making them a great choice for kids, teachers, students, and artists.

Yes, these 180 colouring pencils are designed for all age groups, from young children learning to colour at home or in the classroom to professional artists sketching and shading. Are these pencils safe for children? Absolutely. These non-toxic colouring pencils are safe for children and meet high-quality standards for school and home use. Can these pencils be used for blending and shading? Yes, the soft yet durable lead allows for smooth blending, shading, and layering, making them a great choice for artists and hobbyists. Do they come sharpened? Yes, all 180 pencils come pre-sharpened for immediate use, whether for school, colouring books, or creative projects. Is this set ideal for classrooms and bulk use? Yes, the bulk pack of 180 pencils is perfect for schools, classrooms, teachers, and group activities.
